'''鈭歠-s-zh-z''' ('''kafaszhezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:josh|josh]] (auto-generated)".

|-

| f-s-zh-z

| [[Transitive verb]]
